推荐场景: 项目启动会｜听懂背景和目标
60秒任务: 「项目背景」：背景/优先级/风险/行动项；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 优先级｜风险｜资源｜时间线｜行动项｜责任分配
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Before we jump in, let’s clarify the context.（进入背景）
What problem are we actually trying to solve?（定义问题）
The goal is to ___ by ___.（说明目标）
This started because ___.（说明起因）
The main constraint is ___.（说明限制）
We’re working with limited ___.（资源限制）
Here’s what has changed since last time.（更新变化）
The stakeholders are mainly concerned about ___.（说明关注点）
That explains why the timeline is tight.（解释压力）
Can you walk us through the background?（请求背景）
I want to make sure we’re aligned.（确认一致）
What assumptions are we making?（检查假设）
This connects to the bigger plan.（连接大目标）
Let’s separate the brief from the details.（拆分层级）
Does everyone have the same understanding?（确认共识）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: background, context, brief, goal, scope, stakeholder, constraint, timeline
Verbs: clarify, solve, align, explain, assume, change, connect, review
Adjectives / Status: urgent, limited, unclear, strategic, realistic, aligned
Time / Place: last quarter, this week, by Friday, in the meeting, on the call
Chunks: bigger plan, same understanding, main constraint, project brief, walk us through
